W

WinController - Class in com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.controller
Controller for the Win screen.

WINNING_LEVEL - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.game.Game
The level at which the player wins the game.
WinSound - Variable in class com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.controller.WinController
Sound played when the win screen is shown.
wordBank - Variable in class com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.game.Game
The word bank responsible for generating and validating words.
wordLabel - Variable in class com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.controller.GameController
Label displaying the word the player must type.
words - Variable in class com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.words.Words
Array containing all available words for the game.
Words - Class in com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.words
Implementation of the IWords interface.

Constructs a new Words instance.
wordTextField - Variable in class com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.controller.GameController
Text field where the player types the word.
